competitionRules.notes: 世界杯阵容页规则配置；如 FIFA 官方竞赛规程更新，可按赛季覆盖。

attendanceSource: FootyStats · 参加人数最多的比赛

qualifiers.espnText: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.

events.description: 首发阵容公布，球员热身。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half begins.
Offside, Norway. Alexander Sørloth is caught offside.
Corner, Norway. Conceded by Douglas Santos.
Penalty conceded by Kristoffer Ajer (Norway) after a foul in the penalty area.

events.description: 克里斯托弗·阿耶尔犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: VAR Decision: Penalty Brazil.
Penalty saved. Bruno Guimarães (Brazil) right footed shot saved in the bottom right corner by Ørjan Nyland (Norway).
Foul by Julian Ryerson (Norway).
Attempt missed. Rayan (Brazil) right footed shot from the right side of the box is high and wide to the right. Assisted by Casemiro.

events.description: 拉延射门偏出。 卡塞米罗参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: David Møller Wolfe (Norway) wins a free kick on the left wing.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Attempt missed. Danilo (Brazil) right footed shot from the right side of the box misses to the left. Assisted by Rayan.

events.description: 达尼洛射门偏出。 拉延参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Antonio Nusa (Norway) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Attempt missed. Vinícius Júnior (Brazil) right footed shot from the right side of the box misses to the left. Assisted by Rayan.

events.description: 维尼修斯射门偏出。 拉延参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Martin Ødegaard (Norway) left footed shot from the right side of the box is close, but misses to the right.
Attempt saved. Erling Haaland (Norway) left footed shot from the centre of the box is saved in the top right corner by Alisson Becker (Brazil).
Sander Berge (Norway) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

events.description: 加布里埃尔·马丁内利犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Casemiro (Brazil) left footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Rayan.

events.description: 卡塞米罗射门被封堵。 拉延参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Vinícius Júnior (Brazil) left footed shot from the left side of the box is saved in the bottom left corner by Ørjan Nyland (Norway). Assisted by Gabriel Martinelli.

events.description: 维尼修斯射正。 加布里埃尔·马丁内利参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Brazil. Conceded by Ørjan Nyland.
Attempt blocked. Martin Ødegaard (Norway) left footed shot from a difficult angle on the left is blocked. Assisted by Erling Haaland.

events.description: 厄德高射门被封堵。 哈兰德参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Norway. Conceded by Danilo.
Substitution, Norway. Oscar Bobb replaces Alexander Sørloth.

events.description: 奥斯卡·鲍布替补登场，换下亚历山大·索罗斯。

player.name: 安德烈亚斯·谢尔德鲁普

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Norway. Andreas Schjelderup replaces Antonio Nusa.

events.description: 安德烈亚斯·谢尔德鲁普替补登场，换下安东尼奥·努萨。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Norway. Conceded by Gabriel Martinelli.
Attempt saved. Martin Ødegaard (Norway) left footed shot from the centre of the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Alisson Becker (Brazil).
Attempt blocked. Bruno Guimarães (Brazil) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Vinícius Júnior.

events.description: 吉马良斯射门被封堵。 维尼修斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Matheus Cunha (Brazil) header from the centre of the box misses to the right. Assisted by Bruno Guimarães.

events.description: 马特乌斯·库尼亚射门偏出。 吉马良斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Fourth official has announced 6 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时6分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Julian Ryerson (Norway).
First Half ends, Brazil 0, Norway 0.
Second Half begins Brazil 0, Norway 0.
Handball by Rayan (Brazil).
Oscar Bobb (Norway) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Attempt missed. Patrick Berg (Norway) right footed shot from outside the box is too high. Assisted by Martin Ødegaard.

events.description: 帕特里克·伯格射门偏出。 厄德高参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Brazil. Conceded by Kristoffer Ajer.
Substitution, Brazil. Endrick replaces Matheus Cunha.

events.description: 恩德里克替补登场，换下马特乌斯·库尼亚。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Endrick (Brazil) left footed shot from the centre of the box misses to the left. Assisted by Vinícius Júnior with a through ball following a fast break.

events.description: 恩德里克射门偏出。 维尼修斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Endrick (Brazil) left footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Gabriel Martinelli.

events.description: 恩德里克射门被封堵。 加布里埃尔·马丁内利参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Brazil. Conceded by Torbjørn Heggem.
Attempt saved. Rayan (Brazil) right footed shot from the centre of the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Ørjan Nyland (Norway). Assisted by Gabriel Magalhães with a headed pass.

events.description: 拉延射正。 加布里埃尔·马加良斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Offside, Brazil. Rayan is caught offside.
Substitution, Norway. Fredrik Aursnes replaces Julian Ryerson.

events.description: 弗雷德里克·奥斯内斯替补登场，换下朱利安·瑞尔森。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Norway. Conceded by Gabriel Magalhães.
Attempt missed. Erling Haaland (Norway) left footed shot from the right side of the six yard box misses to the right. Assisted by Kristoffer Ajer following a corner.

events.description: 哈兰德射门偏出。 克里斯托弗·阿耶尔参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Brazil. Neymar replaces Gabriel Martinelli.

events.description: 内马尔替补登场，换下加布里埃尔·马丁内利。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Brazil. Danilo Santos replaces Rayan.

events.description: 达尼洛桑托斯替补登场，换下拉延。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Patrick Berg (Norway) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

player.name: 安德烈亚斯·谢尔德鲁普

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Andreas Schjelderup (Norway) right footed shot from the left side of the box is saved in the bottom left corner by Alisson Becker (Brazil). Assisted by Erling Haaland.

events.description: 安德烈亚斯·谢尔德鲁普射正。 哈兰德参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Brazil. Éderson Silva replaces Bruno Guimarães.

events.description: 埃德森·席尔瓦替补登场，换下吉马良斯。

relatedPlayer.name: 安德烈亚斯·谢尔德鲁普

qualifiers.espnText: Goal! Brazil 0, Norway 1. Erling Haaland (Norway) header from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Andreas Schjelderup with a cross.
Foul by Erling Haaland (Norway).
Corner, Brazil. Conceded by Oscar Bobb.
Corner, Brazil. Conceded by Kristoffer Ajer.
Attempt missed. Neymar (Brazil) right footed shot from the left side of the box misses to the left following a corner.
Corner, Norway. Conceded by Douglas Santos.

relatedPlayer.name: 安德烈亚斯·谢尔德鲁普

qualifiers.espnText: Goal! Brazil 0, Norway 2. Erling Haaland (Norway) left footed shot from outside the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Andreas Schjelderup.
Attempt blocked. Éderson Silva (Brazil) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Neymar.

events.description: 埃德森·席尔瓦射门被封堵。 内马尔参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Norway. Leo Østigård replaces David Møller Wolfe because of an injury.

events.description: 莱奥·奥斯蒂高替补登场，换下大卫·莫勒·沃尔夫。

qualifiers.espnText: Martin Ødegaard (Norway) wins a free kick on the right wing.
Neymar (Brazil) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Fourth official has announced 7 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时7分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Torbjørn Heggem (Norway).
Penalty conceded by Leo Østigård (Norway) after a foul in the penalty area.
Goal! Brazil 1, Norway 2. Neymar (Brazil) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the bottom right corner.
Second Half ends, Brazil 1, Norway 2.
